name: Coconut Oatmeal Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place oats in a bowl. Add boiling water and let stand for 20 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, cream the butter with the granulated sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add the rolled oats to the butter mixture, stirring until combined.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together the dry ingredients: flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
6. Gradually fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture, mixing just until combined.
7. Pour the batter into an ungreased 9-inch cake pan, spreading it evenly.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. For the topping: In another bowl, cream the remaining butter with the brown sugar until smooth.
10. Stir in the light cream, chopped walnuts or pecans, and shredded coconut.
11. Spread the topping evenly over the cake batter.
12. Broil for 2-3 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
13. Serve warm.
Yield: 1 9-inch cake
